raw_comment: I noticed that there aren’t as many people of color in baseball compared to the other sports. I wonder if this is because of discrimination or because people of color just don’t want to do baseball compared to the other sports? I also noticed that coaches of color are only 40% or less, could this be because again of discrimination or there just aren’t enough coaches?
